tickets.summary: Adopt a compile-enforced Unit of Work for private-store writes
tickets.decisions: DD 24150017 (DECIDED 2026-06-30 via /design-sync, page v3). Single aggregate-neutral Database/UnitOfWork factory; accessor-method views (uow.accounts().create()); ALL pg write adapters converted in ONE pass so the bare-pool-write CI guard is global. THREE documented guard exceptions: session_store (tower_sessions::SessionStore), auth_store (jacquard_oauth::ClientAuthStore — site beyond original enumeration, found at build), profile-cache (best-effort GET /me fill). Typestate deferred. cargo sqlx prepare NOT needed (query text unchanged, executors moved only).
tickets.built_notes: 24 files +1406/-1023; new adapter-pg/src/uow.rs + adapter-pg/tests/no_bare_pool_writes.rs. workspace 93 tests pass/0 fail; fmt+clippy(-Dwarnings) clean; CI guard verified to FAIL on planted bare-pool write. dyn-safe commit/accessor worked. TWO guard exceptions: session_store.rs + auth_store.rs (both external &self traits). Profile-cache write folded into GET /me read path (Engineer may reconsider). Nothing handed off.
tickets.review_fixes: Copilot fixes applied (head 88ab442): stale doc, guard hardened (whitespace-insensitive + crate-path-keyed exemptions), mem rollback fidelity (stage/apply/discard + 2 new tests), DD 24150017→v4 (forgotten-commit item ADDRESSED). 117 tests pass; guard fail-loud re-verified on 3 planted violations.

Pure domain string logic mirroring AccountName; new file domain/elements/handle.rs + elements.rs registration; UNIT tests only. xn-- per-label reject on normalized form, uniform across both namespaces (DD 26050561).
